response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with broad experience and roughly 17 years of professional work, but the role demands a director-level AI strategist with recognized expertise and demonstrated large-scale AI products. His AI exposure is recent and limited to tooling and MCP frameworks at a staff-engineer level; there is no evidence of AI strategy leadership, executive advisory work, or the industry recognition the role requires.
strengths: Broad technical range across web, embedded, infrastructure, and now AI-adjacent tooling
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective with real-world deployment
MIT CS degree and consistent record of knowledge sharing through workshops and talks
concerns: AI work is very recent and limited to developer tooling — no demonstrated large-scale AI products or platforms
Staff-engineer seniority and no evidence of director-level IC scope, executive advisory, or industry recognition in AI
No advanced degree in AI and no cloud architecture depth commensurate with the role

key_factors.factor: Broad technical background and founder experience
